data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Recording option (if enabled)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this specific functionality is covered. The linked use case mentions the session is automatically recorded to the cloud, but it does not clarify whether this recording option is enabled by default or if it can be toggled. Therefore, the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the requirement is satisfied, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: Recording option (if enabled) is not explicitly validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
